description: Create a mind map in Wondershare EdrawMax representing the Linux kernel structure. The central node must be 'Linux Kernel' with four main branches: 'Core Subsystems' (containing 'Process Scheduler', 'Memory Manager', 'Virtual File System', and 'Network Stack'), 'Device Drivers' (containing 'Block Devices', 'Character Devices', 'Network Drivers', and 'USB Drivers'), 'Architecture Support' (containing 'x86', 'ARM', 'RISC-V', and 'PowerPC'), and 'Development' (containing 'Linus Torvalds', 'LKML', 'Git Workflow', and 'Stable Releases'). Save the file to /home/ga/linux_kernel_mindmap.eddx.
